testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_328] Ensure that ALB is configured with defensive or strictest desync mitigation mode
[NONE][CKV_AWS_150] Ensure that Load Balancer has deletion protection enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_91] Ensure the ELBv2 (Application/Network) has access logging enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_131] Ensure that ALB drops HTTP headers
[NONE][CKV_AWS_261] Ensure HTTP HTTPS Target group defines Healthcheck
[NONE][CKV_AWS_2] Ensure ALB protocol is HTTPS
[NONE][CKV_AWS_93] Ensure S3 bucket policy does not lockout all but root user. (Prevent lockouts needing root account fixes)
[NONE][CKV_AWS_55] Ensure S3 bucket has ignore public ACLs enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_54] Ensure S3 bucket has block public policy enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_56] Ensure S3 bucket has 'restrict_public_buckets' enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_53] Ensure S3 bucket has block public ACLS enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_216] Ensure CloudFront distribution is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_305] Ensure CloudFront distribution has a default root object configured
[NONE][CKV_AWS_34] Ensure CloudFront distribution ViewerProtocolPolicy is set to HTTPS
[NONE][CKV_AWS_70] Ensure S3 bucket does not allow an action with any Principal
[NONE][CKV_AWS_93] Ensure S3 bucket policy does not lockout all but root user. (Prevent lockouts needing root account fixes)
[NONE][CKV_AWS_66] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group specifies retention days
[NONE][CKV_AWS_66] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group specifies retention days
[NONE][CKV_AWS_393] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order on IAM role
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_63] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_62] Ensure IAM policies that allow full "*-*" administrative privileges are not created
[NONE][CKV_AWS_289] Ensure IAM policies does not allow permissions management / resource exposure without constraints
[NONE][CKV_AWS_286] Ensure IAM policies does not allow privilege escalation
[NONE][CKV_AWS_288] Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration
[NONE][CKV_AWS_287] Ensure IAM policies does not allow credentials exposure
[NONE][CKV_AWS_74] Ensure DocumentDB is encrypted at rest (default is unencrypted)
[NONE][CKV_AWS_223] Ensure ECS Cluster enables logging of ECS Exec
[NONE][CKV_AWS_97] Ensure Encryption in transit is enabled for EFS volumes in ECS Task definitions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_249] Ensure that the Execution Role ARN and the Task Role ARN are different in ECS Task definitions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_335] Ensure ECS task definitions should not share the host's process namespace
[NONE][CKV_AWS_334] Ensure ECS containers should run as non-privileged
[NONE][CKV_AWS_332] Ensure ECS Fargate services run on the latest Fargate platform version
[NONE][CKV_AWS_333] Ensure ECS services do not have public IP addresses assigned to them automatically
[NONE][CKV_AWS_393] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order on IAM role
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy

[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy

[NONE][CKV_AWS_130] Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default
[NONE][CKV_AWS_41] Ensure no hard coded AWS access key and secret key exists in provider

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_158] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS

failure.message: Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_cloudwatch_log_group.ecs_backend File: /cloudwatch.tf: 1-4 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-that-cloudwatch-log-group-is-encrypted-by-kms
1 | resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_group" "ecs_backend" { 2 | name = "/ecs/${var.project_name}-backend" 3 | retention_in_days = 7 4 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_355] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

failure.message: Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_iam_role_policy.vpc_flow_logs_policy File: /cloudwatch.tf: 28-47 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/bc-aws-355
28 | resource "aws_iam_role_policy" "vpc_flow_logs_policy" { 29 | name = "${var.project_name}-vpc-flow-logs-policy" 30 | role = aws_iam_role.vpc_flow_logs_role.id 31 | 32 | policy = jsonencode({ 33 | Version = "2012-10-17" 34 | Statement = [ 35 | { 36 | Effect = "Allow" 37 | Action = [ 38 | "logs:CreateLogStream", 39 | "logs:PutLogEvents", 40 | "logs:DescribeLogGroups", 41 | "logs:DescribeLogStreams" 42 | ] 43 | Resource = "*" 44 | } 45 | ] 46 | }) 47 | }

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_docdb_cluster.main File: /documentdb.tf: 20-31 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-360

Resource: aws_ecs_task_definition.backend File: /ecs.tf: 5-56 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-336
Code lines for this resource are too many. Please use IDE of your choice to review the file.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_130] Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default

failure.message: Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_subnet.public_a File: /networking.tf: 29-39 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-vpc-subnets-do-not-assign-public-ip-by-default
29 | resource "aws_subnet" "public_a" { 30 | 31 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 32 | cidr_block = "10.0.1.0/24" 33 | availability_zone = "us-east-1a" 34 | map_public_ip_on_launch = true 35 | 36 | tags = { 37 | Name = "public-a" 38 | } 39 | }

failure.message: Ensure every security group and rule has a description

5 | resource "aws_security_group" "alb_sg" { 6 | 7 | name = "alb-sg" 8 | 9 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 10 | 11 | ingress { 12 | 13 | from_port = 80 14 | 15 | to_port = 80 16 | 17 | protocol = "tcp" 18 | 19 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 20 | } 21 | 22 | ingress { 23 | 24 | from_port = 443 25 | 26 | to_port = 443 27 | 28 | protocol = "tcp" 29 | 30 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 31 | } 32 | 33 | egress { 34 | 35 | from_port = 0 36 | 37 | to_port = 0 38 | 39 | protocol = "-1" 40 | 41 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 42 | } 43 | }

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_security_group.documentdb_sg File: /security_groups.tf: 84-113 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/networking-31
84 | resource "aws_security_group" "documentdb_sg" { 85 | 86 | name = "documentdb-sg" 87 | 88 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 89 | 90 | ingress { 91 | 92 | from_port = 27017 93 | 94 | to_port = 27017 95 | 96 | protocol = "tcp" 97 | 98 | security_groups = [ 99 | aws_security_group.ecs_sg.id 100 | ] 101 | } 102 | 103 | egress { 104 | 105 | from_port = 0 106 | 107 | to_port = 0 108 | 109 | protocol = "-1" 110 | 111 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 112 | } 113 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_382] Ensure no security groups allow egress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1

failure.message: Ensure no security groups allow egress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_security_group.documentdb_sg File: /security_groups.tf: 84-113 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/bc-aws-382
84 | resource "aws_security_group" "documentdb_sg" { 85 | 86 | name = "documentdb-sg" 87 | 88 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 89 | 90 | ingress { 91 | 92 | from_port = 27017 93 | 94 | to_port = 27017 95 | 96 | protocol = "tcp" 97 | 98 | security_groups = [ 99 | aws_security_group.ecs_sg.id 100 | ] 101 | } 102 | 103 | egress { 104 | 105 | from_port = 0 106 | 107 | to_port = 0 108 | 109 | protocol = "-1" 110 | 111 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 112 | } 113 | }

failure.message: Ensure CloudFront distribution has a response headers policy attached

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_378] Ensure AWS Load Balancer doesn't use HTTP protocol

failure.message: Ensure AWS Load Balancer doesn't use HTTP protocol

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lb_target_group.backend File: /alb.tf: 25-43 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/bc-aws-378
25 | resource "aws_lb_target_group" "backend" { 26 | 27 | name = "prontosalud-tg" 28 | 29 | port = 3000 30 | 31 | protocol = "HTTP" 32 | 33 | target_type = "ip" 34 | 35 | vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id 36 | 37 | health_check { 38 | 39 | path = "/" 40 | 41 | protocol = "HTTP" 42 | } 43 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_62] Ensure S3 buckets should have event notifications enabled

failure.message: Ensure S3 buckets should have event notifications enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_s3_bucket.alb_logs File: /alb_logs.tf: 1-4 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/bc-aws-2-62
1 | resource "aws_s3_bucket" "alb_logs" { 2 | bucket = "${var.project_name}-alb-logs-${random_id.bucket_suffix.hex}" 3 | force_destroy = true 4 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_28] Ensure public facing ALB are protected by WAF

failure.message: Ensure public facing ALB are protected by WAF

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lb.main File: /alb.tf: 1-23 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-public-facing-alb-are-protected-by-waf
1 | resource "aws_lb" "main" { 2 | name = "prontosalud-alb" 3 | load_balancer_type = "application" 4 | internal = false 5 | 6 | enable_deletion_protection = true 7 | drop_invalid_header_fields = true 8 | 9 | access_logs { 10 | bucket = aws_s3_bucket.alb_logs.bucket 11 | prefix = "alb" 12 | enabled = true 13 | } 14 | 15 | security_groups = [ 16 | aws_security_group.alb_sg.id 17 | ] 18 | 19 | subnets = [ 20 | aws_subnet.public_a.id, 21 | aws_subnet.public_b.id 22 | ] 23 | }
